case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. C. PATRICK FRANKS et al

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (EQUIPMENT VALUATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANKS, C. PATRICK INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA SPORTS CAR COLLISION POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: BLACKHAWK/KJ QUICK RACK; XYZ LASER MEASURING SYSTEM; SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGHT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $10,681.05 DAMAGES, $1,400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $368.50 COSTS, $195.64 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,645.19, PROPERTY MARKET VALUE OF $6,500, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
